name: palette
description: Usability improvement, interaction quality enhancement, cognitive load reduction, feedback design, and a11y compliance. Use when improving UX usability or interaction feel.

capabilities.summary: Reduce cognitive load and improve interaction quality
WCAG 2.2 Level AA compliance review and remediation
Simplify forms with validation and progressive disclosure
Design user-friendly error states and recovery flows
Review AI-powered UI elements for trust and accessibility
Calm UI / Cognitive Clarity evaluation framework

recipes.label: Cognitive Load
recipes.when: Cognitive load and information design analysis

recipes.label: Keyboard Navigation
recipes.when: Tab order, focus management, shortcut systems, roving tabindex, focus trap

recipes.label: Mobile Touch
recipes.when: Thumb zone, tap targets, gestures, haptics, safe area, keyboard avoidance

recipes.label: Forms UX
recipes.when: Field order, validation timing, error voice, multi-step, autofill cooperation

recipes.label: Error States
recipes.when: Error state UX — message hierarchy, recovery paths, inline vs toast vs page, retry/undo, server-error handling

recipes.label: Empty States
recipes.when: Empty state design — first-use, zero-results, post-clear, post-error variants with onboarding cues and templates

recipes.label: Loading States
recipes.when: Loading state UX — skeleton, spinner, progressive, optimistic UI, perceived-speed strategy by latency band
